title: Spurious warnings "select out of bounds on signal" when there is no such thing ...

features.name: dynamic indexed part select LHS with complex expression
features.description: Code should include a dynamic indexed part select using the +:width syntax with a complex arithmetic index expression on the left-hand side of an assignment in a loop context, where the index expression involves multiplication and addition of loop variables.

features.name: dynamic indexed part select RHS with same complex expression
features.description: Code should include a dynamic indexed part select using the +:width syntax with the same complex arithmetic index expression on the right-hand side of an assignment in a loop context, where x and o are loop variables.

features.name: wire and reg signals with same unpacked dimensions
features.description: Code should include both a wire and a reg signal declared with identical unpacked dimensions (MDW-1:0), used in dynamic indexed part selects within a loop where one produces spurious warnings and the other does not.
